name: RIO
summary: RIO (Rapplication Internet Online) — an early-web-style browser for the RACon ecosystem, loaded as an .egg cartridge into RACon. The application layer (OSI L7) over the kited network.
tagline: An early browser for the kited web.

console.note: Insert into RACon (the egg hatches into the RIO twin), or open index.html for the standalone early-web browser.
